name: Creamy Dill Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all meatball ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into 20 meatballs and place them in a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Cook at HIGH (100%) for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring gently 3-4 times and rearranging the meatballs as needed.
4. In a 4-cup measure or small bowl, cook butter at HIGH (100%) for 45 seconds to 1 minute until melted.
5. Stir in flour, dill, 1/4 teaspoon paprika, salt, and pepper.
6. Blend in milk. Cook at HIGH (100%) for 3-5 minutes until thickened and bubbly, stirring after every minute.
7. Pour the sauce over the meatballs and sprinkle with remaining paprika.
8. Serve over hot buttered noodles.
